semantic.role: Release changelog for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Documenting notable changes for each public release version
Tracking new features, security enhancements, documentation updates, refactoring, and test coverage
Maintaining a record of version-specific schema compatibility and migration boundaries
outOfScope: Internal development changes during closed beta phases
Detailed design rationale or architectural decisions

English.purpose: This document records all significant changes made in each public release of ArchSpine, serving as the authoritative changelog for version tracking and upgrade planning.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers, release managers, and system integrators who need to understand what changed between versions, especially regarding schema compatibility, CLI behavior, and artifact strategy. The changelog is bilingual (English and Chinese) and targets both human readers and automated CI pipelines.
key_takeaways: First public release (1.0.0) introduces core workflows: init, sync, check, fix, mcp start
Two Git integration modes are available: local and distributable artifact strategies
Schema version 1.0.0 is enforced at runtime; older snapshots are rejected and require rebuild
Atomic writes and runtime locks protect .spine updates for reliability
Atlas cleanup removes stale locale directories before writing
CLI commands are refactored into separate orchestration, repository integration, and bootstrap layers
Demo project updated to align with distributable reference layout

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档记录 ArchSpine 每个公开发布版本中的显著变化，是版本追踪与升级规划的唯一权威变更日志。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向需要了解版本间变更的开发者、发布经理和系统集成人员，尤其关注 schema 兼容性、CLI 行为变化和产物策略。变更日志采用中英双语编写，同时服务于人工阅读和自动化 CI 流水线。
key_takeaways: 首个公开发布版本 1.0.0 引入了核心工作流：init、sync、check、fix、mcp start
支持两种 Git 集成模式：local（本地）与 distributable（可分发）产物策略
运行时强制使用 schema 版本 1.0.0，旧快照将被拒绝并提示重建
通过原子写入和运行时锁保护 .spine 更新的可靠性
Atlas 写入前自动清理已不在配置中的旧 locale 目录
CLI 命令重构为独立的命令编排层、仓库集成层和运行时引导层
示例项目已对齐为分发型参考布局
